title: elaphoglossum marquisearum
intro: Elaphoglossum marquisearum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Caledonia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Elaphoglossum marquisearum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although specific herbal preparations and dosages may vary.
